item.name: Manacutter Key
item.description: An iron key that completes the circuit connecting a manacutter's steering mechanism with its engine.

mount.name: Manacutter
mount.action: Call into battle your manacutter, a single-rider airship constructed at the Garlond Ironworks.
mount.description: Supervised (in spirit) by the ever-absent Cid, Biggs and Wedge (with a little bending over by Biggs) put their heads together to create this flight-ready miniature airship, powered by the realm's first corrupted crystal engine.
mount.tooltip:
There are more of these
“manacutters” to be had,
yes?
- Aymeric
